summary: Plan-only PR remediation shard. No GitHub mutations are allowed by this job. The hydrated artifact shows no security-sensitive items. None of the PRs has a complete merge preflight with clean Codex /review proof, resolved comments/bot findings, known mergeability, and passing relevant checks where required; each open PR is therefore classified non-mutatingly or blocked for maintainer judgment/repair.

actions.reason: Useful focused contributor PR, but merge is blocked by the current ClawSweeper needs-changes verdict and missing merge preflight. Repair path should stay on the contributor branch if possible.
The implementation appears focused and useful, but the stored data model change is a maintainer judgment call under the job's require_human rules and merge preflight is incomplete.

Useful narrow fix, but failing checks-node-core-tooling and missing merge preflight block merge. Because maintainer_can_modify=false, any repair may need a replacement path if the branch cannot be safely updated by automation.
Broad feature/config/protocol surface requires maintainer judgment under the job rules. It should not be merged or repaired automatically from this inventory shard.
Small high-quality candidate, but it changes auth/provider fallback routing and lacks the complete merge preflight required for a merge recommendation.
Related product/session-state issue, but not covered fully by #91093 and not closable in this shard.
Clearly covered by #90122, but post-merge closure is disabled and #90122 has not landed; keep issue open as related/fixed-by-candidate context.
Related complementary PR, not duplicate of #90122. It needs its own completed review/finalization outside this seed PR inventory decision.

needs_human: #90122 needs maintainer judgment on the stored UI chat data-model change before merge.
#91093 is a broad feature/config/protocol/docs PR and requires maintainer product/scope review, not automated merge or repair from this shard.
#93183 changes /btw auth/provider fallback routing and lacks complete merge preflight despite passing checks.
#89975 has an unresolved/failed targeted re-review and prior maintainer regression concern; it should be reviewed separately before any merge recommendation.
